name: swift-sim-companion
description: Hot reload supported SwiftUI edits and build signed iPhone updates from a Mac-hosted Codex session.

interface.shortDescription: Hot reload and install iPhone prototypes.
interface.longDescription: A setup-aware Codex workflow that hot reloads compatible SwiftUI edits into a remote Debug app, automatically falls back to a signed update link for structural changes, preserves app history and data, and optionally previews a Mac-hosted Simulator.
defaultPrompt: Build this app to my iPhone with Swift Sim.
Update the app on my iPhone without losing its data.
Hot reload this SwiftUI change on my iPhone.
Open a quick live Simulator preview in Swift Sim.
